name: Cirium Aviation Analytics and Flight Data REST API
what_it_does: Cirium aviation analytics REST API for airlines, airports, lessors, investors, travel companies, and aviation insurers to access comprehensive flight performance data, airline financial analytics, fleet data, aircraft valuations, and predictive delay models — enabling data-driven aviation decisions through Cirium's (RELX Group) integrated aviation intelligence combining historical flight data, airline economics, and predictive analytics. Enables AI agents to manage flight status for real-time and historical performance monitoring automation, handle airline analytics for carrier financial and network intelligence automation, access fleet data for aircraft type and utilization analytics automation, retrieve aircraft valuation for lessor and investor portfolio automation, manage delay prediction for proactive disruption management automation, handle passenger data for O&D traffic flow analytics automation, access airport performance for hub capacity analytics automation, retrieve route profitability for airline network strategy automation, manage maintenance analytics for aircraft health prediction automation, and integrate Cirium with airline operations, airport management, and aviation finance platforms for data-driven aviation automation.
use_cases: Monitoring real-time and historical flight performance for airline operations disruption management automation agents
Accessing airline financial and network analytics for aviation investor due diligence automation agents
Retrieving fleet and aircraft valuation data for aircraft lessor portfolio management automation agents
Analyzing route traffic and passenger demand for airline network planning optimization automation agents
not_for: Travel booking and ticketing (Cirium provides analytics, not GDS booking capability)
Individual consumer flight search (Cirium is B2B aviation analytics, not consumer travel)
Ground handling operations (Cirium focuses on flight performance and airline analytics, not ground ops)
best_when: An airline, airport, aircraft lessor, aviation investor, or travel technology company wanting AI agents to access comprehensive flight performance data, airline analytics, fleet intelligence, and predictive models through Cirium's (RELX Group) aviation intelligence platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE DATA SUBSCRIPTION: Cirium data requires enterprise licensing through RELX Group; automated open API access assumption creates no endpoint access; automated must establish Cirium enterprise subscription. DIFFERENT PRODUCTS FOR DIFFERENT NEEDS: Cirium has multiple distinct products (Diio Mi for airline strategy, Flights for operations, Fleet for aircraft data); automated single-API-for-all assumption creates wrong product selection; automated must identify correct Cirium product for specific use case. HISTORICAL DATA HAS EMBARGO PERIODS: Some Cirium flight performance data has embargo periods before full data becomes available; automated real-time historical completion assumption creates data_not_yet_available for recent dates; automated must account for Cirium data publication schedules. RELX DATA GOVERNANCE: As RELX Group company, Cirium has strict data governance and licensing; automated redistribution without license assumption creates licensing violation; automated must comply with Cirium/RELX data use agreements.

auth.notes: Cirium uses API key + OAuth2 for aviation analytics REST API. REST API with JSON. London, UK HQ. Cirium is RELX Group company (formed 2019 from merger of FlightGlobal data, Diio Mi, Innovata). Products: Cirium Flights (operations), Cirium Diio (analytics), Cirium Fleet, Cirium Valuations. SDKs: None public. Aviation data from 1970s. Used by 800+ airlines, airports, lessors. Competes with OAG for aviation data and analytics.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo access for enterprise evaluation; production requires RELX/Cirium enterprise contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription by product and data depth; custom pricing for large data access
pricing.notes: London UK. RELX Group. Enterprise subscription. 800+ airline customers. Aviation analytics market leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; analytics and historical query APIs throttled per enterprise tier

known_agent_gotchas: MULTIPLE PRODUCT APIS ARE DISTINCT: Cirium Flights, Diio, Fleet, and Valuations are separate API products with different endpoints and schemas; automated single-Cirium-API assumption creates product_not_found for cross-product queries; automated must use correct product API for each data type

AIRCRAFT DESIGNATOR CODES: Cirium uses IATA aircraft type codes (A320, B737) and ICAO codes for fleet data; automated non-standard aircraft code assumption creates aircraft_type_not_found; automated must use proper IATA/ICAO aircraft designator codes

AIRLINE FINANCIAL DATA HAS REPORTING LAG: Airline financial data follows quarterly reporting cycles; automated real-time financial data assumption creates data_not_available for unreported periods; automated must account for airline reporting schedules

DELAY PREDICTION MODELS NEED CONTEXT: Cirium delay prediction uses weather, historical patterns, and connections; automated simple delay query assumption creates insufficient_context for accurate prediction; automated must provide proper flight context for predictive models

VALUATIONS ARE POINT-IN-TIME: Aircraft valuations are calculated at specific dates and market conditions; automated current-valuation-always assumption creates stale_valuation for non-refreshed queries; automated must specify valuation date and market conditions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Aviation analytics. GDPR, RELX data governance. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Flight, airline, and aircraft portfolio data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Aviation analytics. GDPR, RELX. API key + OAuth2. UK/EU. Airline and aircraft financial data.
